rootCause: priceDateChange froze reservation.durationClass and did unitPrice×countBillableUnits (linear). No re-selection of weekly/monthly tier.
fix: resolveSpaceStayPricing() picks cheapest applicable enabled tariff (weekly if ≥7 Paris days, monthly if ≥28). Used by date-change preview/confirm; reservation.durationClass updated on confirm.
case: RES-2026-00019 FOCUS: extend Aug12–14 (3 daily) → Aug12–18 (7 days)
noteOnBookingEngine: POST /booking/price currently takes client durationClass with qty=1 (phase1 hourly/daily only) — it does not yet auto-select weekly. Date-change now uses shared resolveSpaceStayPricing for full tier selection; booking can adopt the same helper later.
